claim: OpenAI's o1 model reduces hallucinations by using extended reasoning (chain-of-thought) as the default, not an optional technique
actionable: For critical accuracy tasks, use o1 models that enforce reasoning steps internally rather than relying on prompt-based chain-of-thought

claim: o1's reasoning overhead makes it expensive and slower; it trades speed for reduced hallucinations, unsuitable for real-time or latency-sensitive applications
actionable: Reserve o1 models for offline analysis and critical accuracy tasks; use faster models for real-time applications
